headline: Alcohol-Related Hospital Admissions Rise 28% Among 18-25 Age Group
context: Young adult alcohol-related hospitalizations increased significantly from 2022 to 2025 amid binge drinking trends.

cards.big: Alcohol-related hospital admissions among 18-25 year olds rose 28% from 2022 to 2025
cards.sub: Binge drinking events and alcohol poisoning cases drive the hospitalization increase

cards.big: Malaysia has no minimum legal drinking age only a minimum legal purchase age of 21
cards.sub: Legal gap means minors who consume alcohol face no deterrent framework

cards.big: Alcohol advertising spending increased 42% on digital platforms targeting young adults since 2022
cards.sub: Social media alcohol marketing bypasses traditional broadcast restrictions

cards.big: Scotland's minimum unit pricing reduced alcohol hospitalizations 10% within 2 years of implementation
cards.sub: Price-based interventions effectively reduce harmful consumption patterns

cards.big: Increasing alcohol marketing to young people while lacking treatment capacity is creating crisis by design
Should Malaysia implement minimum unit pricing for alcohol and restrict digital marketing to youth
